titlestmt.titleproper: School of Hotel Administration Deans records28-1-4069
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:19:49 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

ead.archdesc:
======= RMA04069School of Hotel Administration Deans records28-1-4069Compiled by RMC StaffDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
November 20132B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:31:27 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
School of Hotel Administration Deans records
Cornell University. School of Hotel Administration. Dean
28-1-4069
45 cubic feet. 45 cubic feet.
1981-2012. Correspondence, printed materials. Includes correspondence, reports, meeting minutes, distinguished speaker lists, photographs, subject files, and other records of the School of Hotel Administration, particularly pertaining to the Office of the Dean. Collection material in English 8272043
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
November 2013
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, November 2013
Date modified:
RMC Staff, November 2014
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes correspondence, reports, meeting minutes, distinguished speaker lists, photographs, subject files, and other records of the School of Hotel Administration, particularly pertaining to the Office of the Dean.
Cite As:
School of Hotel Administration Dean's Records, #28-1-4069. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Access Restrictions:
Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.
Photographs. Hotel management schools -- New York (State) -- Ithaca. Hotel management -- Study and teaching. Cornell University -- : Faculty.
